---
listing:
    type: table
    contents: resources
    fields: [subtitle, title, description]
    field-display-names:
        subtitle: "Title"
        title: "Name"
    field-links: [subtitle, title]
    sort-ui: [subtitle, title, description]
    filter-ui: [subtitle, title, description]
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

# `feasibility-data`: ON LiMiT Feasibility Study Data

**Licenses:**

- [CC0 1.0 Universal](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/)

**Version:** 0.6.0

Full data set on 24 participants in the feasibility arm of the ON LiMiT study. ON LiMiT is looking at remission of type 2 diabetes using diet and exercise.

## Contributors

- Kristiane Beicher (<kris.beicher@clin.au.dk>): DataManager, DataCurator, ContactPerson
- Daniel Borch Ibsen (<dbi@ph.au.dk>): ContactPerson
- Luke W Johnston (<lwjohnst@clin.au.dk>): DataManager, DataCurator
- Marton Vago (<mvago@clin.au.dk>): DataManager, DataCurator

## Resources
